genre_refs: Norman Rockwell; Boy Scouts of America
description: Reproduction of an American illustration shared without any added on-image design elements or overlaid text (the caption and attribution appear in the tweet, not on the image). The painting depicts a young Boy Scout in uniform standing in profile on a grassy rise: he wears a khaki scout uniform with a red neckerchief, knee socks and boots, carries a bedroll or pack, holds a staff and his brimmed campaign hat, and gazes upward and to the left. Behind and above him, rendered in blue cloud, is the translucent figure of a Revolutionary or Continental-era soldier (a Minuteman or George Washington type figure) with arm outstretched; a torch or beacon glows at lower left. The style is painterly oil illustration with warm and cool lighting. The tweet titles it 'A Scout is Loyal' and attributes it to Norman Rockwell. The tweet text reads 'Remember who you are, American. 250 Years of American Greatness.' The image bears no agency graphic treatment, seals, or slogan text.
